hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'--force'*|*'--hard'*|*'-rf '*|*'rm -rf'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'drop table'*|*'--no-verify'*|*'push -f'*|*'push --force'*) echo 'CAUTION: Destructive command detected. Confirm intent before proceeding.' ;; esac
echo 'BLOCKED: Do not comment on issues. Let the code speak for itself.'
echo 'BLOCKED: Do not post review comments. Commit fixes directly.'
echo 'BLOCKED: Do not reply on pull requests. Address feedback in code.'
echo 'BLOCKED: Do not submit PR reviews. Use /review locally instead.'

case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git commit'*) COMMIT_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | grep -q 'claude.ai/code/session'; then CLEANED=$(echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | sed '/https:\/\/claude\.ai\/code\/session/d' | sed -e :a -e '/^\n*$/{$d;N;ba}'); git commit --amend -m "$CLEANED" 2>/dev/null; echo 'Stripped session link from commit message.'; fi ;; esac
